summary: A Fox News 'America's Newsroom' interview clip with Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons speaking about an op-ed by the father of a victim and about ICE operations. Split-screen composition with chyrons.
notable_text: ANGEL DAD'S OP-ED ON DAUGHTER GETTING JUSTICE; DEMS PUSH BACK ON I.C.E. ENFORCEMENT IN BIG CITIES; TODD LYONS ACTING I.C.E. DIRECTOR; FOX NEWS ALERT
